name: mathtype-for-word
description: Create and validate native MathType equations in Word and PowerPoint, including Word-native equation numbers and references.

interface.shortDescription: Native MathType equations in Word and PowerPoint.
interface.longDescription: Automates genuine Equation.DSMT4 equations in Word and PowerPoint, plus MathType-native (1) numbering, cross-references, field updates, and structural validation in Word documents.
defaultPrompt: Replace Word markers with native MathType equations.
Add MathType-native equation numbers and references.
Replace PowerPoint markers with editable centered MathType equations.
Validate MathType equations in this Word or PowerPoint file.
